strategies.name: Combined Portfolio (Trend + XS Momentum + Carry)
strategies.description: Three-sleeve portfolio: trend momentum (50%), cross-sectional momentum (35%), funding carry (15%)

strategies.name: Trend / Time-Series Momentum
strategies.description: DMA crossover + breakout detection + time-series momentum with inverse-vol sizing

strategies.name: Cross-Sectional Momentum
strategies.description: Rank symbols by multi-lookback returns, long top-N and short bottom-N

strategies.name: Funding-Aware Carry
strategies.description: Long/short based on perpetual funding rates with trend veto filter

single_combined_daily.description: Single combined portfolio, daily rebalance — default setup

dual_profile.description: Daily + hourly combined portfolios running in parallel — default production setup

multi_strategy.description: Three isolated sleeves running independently for attribution analysis

research_small.description: Small capital versions of all four strategies for research comparison
